_comment: ADR 0018 Tier-A library CI contract. hostBuild.libraries are the Tier-A Zephyr libraries the native_sim lane can honestly build; hostBuild.excludedLibraries lists Tier-A libraries whose upstream Kconfig cannot build on native_sim. familyMatrix names one Zephyr slice per supported SoM family. Consumed by .github/workflows/pr-tier-a-libraries.yml and validated by scripts/validate_metadata.py; intended as the portability-matrix cross-check source.

excludedLibraries.cmsis-nn: Zephyr's CMSIS-NN Kconfig depends on CPU_CORTEX_M, so native_sim cannot build it; metadata and emission are covered by Python tests until a real Cortex-M board build lane is available.
